headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' blob: https://cdn.tiny.cloud; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.tiny.cloud; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://*.supabase.co https://cdn.tiny.cloud https://sp.tinymce.com; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://cdn.tiny.cloud https://sp.tinymce.com; font-src 'self' data: https://cdn.tiny.cloud; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; media-src 'self' blob:; worker-src 'self' blob:;
